inflection_claims.claim: While both Nvidia and AMD have benefited from AI accelerator demand, their business strategies diverge significantly. Nvidia has concentrated 92% of revenue in data center AI chips, achieving 85% revenue growth and trading at 31x earnings. AMD maintains a more diversified portfolio across CPUs, GPUs, and embedded chip...
